  "findings": [
    "Missing secondary bonding jumper on a Separately Derived System (SDS)",
    "Failure to establish a reliable ground-fault current path back to the transformer neutral"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a properly sized system bonding jumper between the neutral terminal and the equipment grounding conductor/enclosure in accordance with NEC 250.30(A)(1)"
  ],
  "rationale": "A separately derived system (SDS) such as a dry-type transformer requires a system bonding jumper to connect the grounded conductor (neutral) to the equipment grounding conductor. Without this jumper, a ground fault on the secondary side will not trip the overcurrent protective device, creating a severe shock and fire hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.30(A)(1)",
    "NEC Art. 450"
  ]
}
